title: South Korea Wants to Build Гўв‚¬ЛњWorldГўв‚¬в„ўs LargestГўв‚¬в„ў Liquefied Hydrogen Carrier
content: South KoreaГўв‚¬в„ўs government has revealed plans to build Гўв‚¬Лњthe worldГўв‚¬в„ўs largestГўв‚¬в„ў liquefied hydrogen (LH2) carrier in an effort to develop a competitive advantage in this market segment and ensure the future of the Korean shipbuilding industry. As informed, the demonstration ship is expected to be built by 2027. The government intends to invest KRW 55.5 billion ($39.2 million) this year, as per the Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE). The ministry formed a public-private promotion groupГўв‚¬вЂќcomprised of top domestic experts on LH2 carriers from MOTIE, three shipbuilders, universities, and research institutesГўв‚¬вЂќat a ceremony in Busan on May 9, 2025.
author: Analysts Account
